title: At 10 months of age ,baby can now *

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
At 10 months of age ,baby can now *
Draw straight line
Says mama and dada
Arrange 3 cubes
Walk few steps without support

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
One of the following is not an indication for surgical closure of VSD: *
Infants 6-12 mo of age with large VSD associated with pulmonary HPN
Patients at any age with large defects and cant be controlled medically
Severe pulmonary vascular disease non responsive to pulmonary vasodilators
Patients older than 24 mo with Qp:Qs ratio greater than 2:1

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Patients older than 24 mo with Qp:Qs ratio greater than 2:1. This is not an indication for surgical closure of VSD.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
A 10 year old female adolescent was seen at neuro OPD for several episode of generalized spam followed by shaking of the body. This was associated with salivation. To diagnose her epilepsy the following criteria must be met : *
Treat the seizures based on the type of the attack
10 - 15 % of epilepsy has aura
Aside for good history and PE the ancillary procedures is EEG
Loss of consciousness is a prequisite for the diagnosis of epilepsy
All the choices are correct

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Aside from good history and PE, the ancillary procedure is EEG. This is the correct choice. 

The other choices are incorrect. Treatment of the seizures is not a diagnostic criterion but is a therapeutic modality. Not all patients with epilepsy have an aura, so this is an incorrect statement. Loss of consciousness is not a prerequisite for the diagnosis of epilepsy, so this is also an incorrect statement.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Renal biopsy in Acute Post Strep GN should be considered in all the following except: *
Acute renal failure
Nephrotic syndrome
Absence of evidence of streptococcal infection
Low C3 level in the ist month

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Renal biopsy in Acute Post-Strep GN should be considered in all of the following except absence of evidence of streptococcal infection.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
A 17 yo female is affected by an inherited 
disorder.She has two brothers who are not affected 
and two sisters who are also affected.Her father is 
affected but not his mother.What is the mode of 
inheritance? *
Autosomal recessive
X Linked dominant
X linked recessive
Autosomal dominant

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: The mode of inheritance is X-linked dominant.
